arts.ttl: €150m bid on the table as Amorim takes DRASTIC action
arts.sum: €150m bid on the table as Amorim takes DRASTIC action – Man Utd transfer news today Man Utd are planning their summer transfer window already, with an astonishing report of a transfer bid that could shatter their club record.

arts.ttl: Maddison returns, Mathys Tel switch - The Tottenham team Postecoglou must select vs Man United - football.london
arts.sum: Gold's team: Vicario; Porro, Danso, Davies, Spence; Bentancur, Bissouma, Maddison; Kulusevski, Tel, Son. We asked our Spurs correspondents Alasdair Gold and Rob Guest to name the team they would select to face Manchester United on Sunday and here's what they came up with.

arts.ttl: Amad confirms injury as reports suggest Amorim faces midfield crisis
arts.sum: Amad has now confirmed that he will be out with an injury, which reports suggest is with an ankle ligament that could mean he will miss for the rest of the season. Other reports suggest that Amorim will also not be able to call upon his midfield trio of Manuel Ugarte, Kobbie Mainoo and Toby Collyer for the trip to north London.

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted lineup vs Man Utd - Premier League
arts.sum: Tottenham's predicted starting XI vs Man Utd in the Premier League on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer BOMBSHELL: €150m bid put on the table that will break Pep’s heart
arts.sum: With the Old Trafford side in drastic need of offensive strengthening, Ruben Amorim’s side are ready to make a club-record offer to sign Atletico Madrid forward Julian Alvarez, according to a report from Fichajes . While there is little doubt that a player of Alvarez’s quality would strengthen Man Utd, the rumours of such a signing look out of context in the current situation at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Manchester Utd might have wildcard solution to replace Amad after devastating injury blow
arts.sum: Amad has confirmed a long-term injury in a blow to Man United, with Ruben Amorim needing to find a solution

arts.ttl: Amad Diallo confirms Man United fans' worst fears after injury bombshell as star breaks his silence with 46-word social media message
arts.sum: As Mail Sport exclusively revealed, Diallo was hurt in training this week and is still being assessed, but he is expected to be out for at least two months and may not play again this campaign.
